channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Amazon Cloud Facilities in Middle East Knocked Out by Apparent Iranian Drone Strikes
item.description: Cloud customers are being urged to migrate their data away from the Middle East.

item.title: As an NBN expert, I can’t believe how affordable Kogan Internet’s NBN 500 plan is — and it's just scored another price drop
item.description: If you're looking for a more affordable NBN plan, then there's one provider that's a clear winner in my book.

item.title: Facing Backlash, OpenAI Amends Pentagon Deal to Add More Anti-Surveillance Verbiage
item.description: When Katy Perry sides with your competitor, something's got to be done.

item.title: Xiaomi’s Watch 5 has just launched globally, and it could be an affordable Google Pixel Watch 4 rival
item.description: The Xiaomi Watch 5 smartwatch has launched outside China, bringing some new features along for the ride.
